Interface IReplacePathsParameters3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to replace paths.

[Guid("5A085678-4918-49F2-A24B-4B514DAA341B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IReplacePathsParameters3 : IReplacePathsParameters2, IReplacePathsParameters

ReplaceRasterFunctionTemplatePaths

Indicates whether paths in raster function templates of the mosaic dataset are replaced.
